channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)

item.title: 📝 Arthur-Ficial/apfel (4841 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Arthur-Ficial

📝 Repository: Arthur-Ficial/apfel

📄 Descrizione: The free AI already on your Mac. CLI tool, OpenAI-compatible server, and interactive chat — all on-device via Apple Intelligence. No API keys, no cloud, no downloads.

⭐ Stelle: 4841

🍴 Forks: 186

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: apple-intelligence apple-silicon cli foundationmodels homebrew llm macos macos-26 on-device openai-compatible swift tool-calling unix

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-24T19:07:22Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-22T04:30:53Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 momenbasel/PureMac (3540 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: momenbasel

📝 Repository: momenbasel/PureMac

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source macOS cleaner. CleanMyMac alternative with zero telemetry. Native SwiftUI, scheduled auto-cleaning, Xcode/Homebrew/system cache cleanup. MIT licensed.

⭐ Stelle: 3540

🍴 Forks: 197

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: cache-cleaner cleanmymac cleanup disk-cleaner disk-space homebrew mac-utility macos macos-app macos-cleaner macosx native oss osx privacy swift swiftui system-cleaner xcode-cleaner

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-08T12:59:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-28T05:16:16Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: erha19

📝 Repository: erha19/ping-island

📄 Descrizione: A macOS menu bar (Vibe Island liked ) app that monitors AI coding sessions in a Dynamic Island-style surface — approve, respond, and jump back to the right window, all from the notch. 一款 macOS 菜单栏应用，以灵动岛风格集中监控多个 AI 编程助手的会话，支持审批、追问和窗口跳转

item.description:

📝 Repository: HMAKT99/UnTouchID
